when you say carry what exactly do you mean btw as it can mean various things

by carry i mean like a main damage dealer that can continue to scale with content difficulty, in your comp, tulu and goliath (although labled as assault role) are both considered supports, they are not true damage dealers. the closest one you have in that team is caec and his counter
my recommendation is to pull thais from the current banner (to E2 if possible) and use her together with caec
so your final team probably looks like: tulu goliath caec thais

regarding pollux rotation, is the order: castor’s onyx plume > 3 cost > sacred heart before exalting right?
is your pollux E3? :0
Still at E1 but i have 2 prototype copy as of now
ohh, e3 changes the combo entirely
like how so
sacred heart -> pollux posse/castor plume/insight -> sacred heart -> plume/insight -> sacred heart -> 3 cost (which is now 0 cost thanks to E2?)
at 100 or more stacks, after you exhaust sacred heart, you'll draw a pollux skill
so the combo becomes VERY consistent
100 or more stacks of sin mark?
yus
before 100 marks, youll have to rely on drawing yourself the 3 cost or 2 cost
probably using castors plumes
Is 2 cost that good for elite boss? i rarely use them
since its mainly for drawing cards
nyo, 3 cost is the goat for bosses
but 2 cost is nice for when you have lots of mobs
agree
Does sacred heart increase corrosion stack?
nyo, it consumes it
so if you go for the kill, you can unload all your plumes before playing the 3 cost
even if you dont consume all the corrosion with the 3 cost
youll probably consume it with the bleed
How many plumes do i use in between sacred heart?
i always use just 1
granted, you have to know your damage
if you have a good grasp on how much the 3 cost usually hits for, you can estimate how many plumes you can use before

Hi everyone,
I'm new to the game and need some help from veterans because I'm still not quite getting the hang of it.
I finished Act 4 with this lineup. The strategy is simple: everything revolves around Mouchette's exalt, making the enemy vulnerable and unloading Strikes. "Caro" characters provide healing and  "Embryos" to accelerate Mouchette's exalt. Ramona is for tutoring Shining Crush and maximizing damage that turn.
My questions are:
1) Should I keep rolling for Mouchette until she gets to E3?
2) How should I use the "By The Silver Key's" free Awakening? Should I still go with Castor even if I can't put him on the team?
3) I tested the team by inviting an E2 Thais in place of Uvhash and she seemed much stronger. Should I try taking her too?
If you have any other suggestions, they're welcome! Thank you so much. L.
